# CHAT-2A-HANDOFF.md
# Generated by: Chat 2A вЂ” Planner Agent (Structure)
# To be used by: Chat 2B вЂ” Planner Agent (Design + Finalize)

---

## Open Questions Resolved (from CHAT-1-HANDOFF.md)

1. **Chart library**: **Recharts** вЂ” composable React API, smaller bundle than Chart.js+wrapper.
2. **PDF generation**: **`pdfkit` on backend** вЂ” server-side generation, returns PDF buffer as file download. No client-side overhead.
3. **Folder structure**: See Phases 5вЂ“7 below.
4. **Axios instance location**: `frontend/src/services/axiosInstance.js`
5. **Academic year**: **Separate `AcademicYear` model** вЂ” `{ schoolId, label, startDate, endDate, isCurrent }`. All academic data carries `academicYearId` ref. Historical data preserved on year switch.
6. **Monitor appointment**: **Field on Section** вЂ” `monitorStudentId: ObjectId (ref: User, optional)`. No separate record.
7. **Parent-student linking**: `User.studentIds[]` on parent documents. `notificationService` fans out to parent socket rooms on class broadcasts by querying parents whose `studentIds` includes each student in the class.
8. **ESLint/Prettier**: ESLint with Airbnb config + Prettier. `.eslintrc.cjs` and `.prettierrc` committed. `eslint-config-airbnb` with React rules.
9. **OTP fallback**: **Yes** вЂ” Twilio SMS first; if Twilio throws, `otpService` falls back to Nodemailer email OTP. `deliveryMethod: 'sms' | 'email'` stored on OTP document for audit.
10. **Manager creation flow**: Principal creates manager в†’ system generates 12-char temp password (UUID-based) в†’ creates User with `mustChangePassword: true` в†’ sends credentials via Nodemailer email + Twilio SMS to manager's registered contact.

---

## Project Summary

- **Name**: EduCore ERP
- **One-liner**: A subscription-based, multi-school SaaS ERP unifying academic, financial, and operational management across nine role-based panels.
- **Tech stack**: React + Vite (JSX, no TS), Redux Toolkit, React Router v6, Axios, Zod + React Hook Form, Socket.io-client, Framer Motion, react-hot-toast, Recharts | Node.js + Express, MongoDB + Mongoose, JWT (access 15min localStorage + refresh 7d httpOnly cookie), Socket.io, Cloudinary, Twilio, Nodemailer, express-validator, pdfkit
- **State management tool**: Redux Toolkit вЂ” `createAsyncThunk` for all async ops, feature slices per domain
- **User roles**: `superAdmin`, `principal`, `financeManager`, `hrManager`, `academicManager`, `adminManager`, `teacher`, `student`, `parent`
- **Key constraints**: No TypeScript, no inline styles, no `@/` aliases, no barrel files, relative paths only, all routes `/api/v1/`, thin controllers, `console.log` at key points, rate limiting on every route, CORS from env

---

## Key File Locations

| File | Exact Path |
|---|---|
| HTTP client | `frontend/src/services/axiosInstance.js` |
| Endpoint constants | `frontend/src/services/endpoints.js` |
| State store | `frontend/src/store/store.js` |
| Root reducer | `frontend/src/store/rootReducer.js` |
| Router config | `frontend/src/router/AppRouter.jsx` |
| ProtectedRoute | `frontend/src/router/ProtectedRoute.jsx` |
| RoleGuard | `frontend/src/router/RoleGuard.jsx` |
| Root route aggregator | `backend/src/routes/v1.js` |
| App setup | `backend/src/app.js` |
| Server entry | `backend/src/server.js` |
| Global CSS | `frontend/src/styles/global.css` |
| App constants | `frontend/src/constants/roles.js`, `statusLabels.js`, `appConfig.js` |
| Socket init | `backend/src/socket/socketInit.js` |
| AppError | `backend/src/utils/AppError.js` |

---

## All Frontend Pages вЂ” Full Inventory

### Public Pages

| Page | Route | Panel | Contains |
|---|---|---|---|
| `LoginPage.jsx` | `/login` | Public | Two-tab form: Email+Password tab, Mobile+OTP tab. ForgotPassword link. |
| `ForgotPasswordPage.jsx` | `/forgot-password` | Public | Email or mobile input, OTP delivery toggle, OTP entry, new password field. |

### Super Admin Panel

| Page | Route | Panel | Contains |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SaDashboardPage.jsx` | `/superadmin/dashboard` | Super Admin | KPI cards (total schools, active, suspended, expiring soon), overview table of schools with status badge, search |
| `SchoolsListPage.jsx` | `/superadmin/schools` | Super Admin | Paginated table of all schools, status badge, search bar, "Add School" button |
| `SchoolDetailPage.jsx` | `/superadmin/schools/:schoolId` | Super Admin | School info form, principal account section, Suspend/Reactivate action buttons, subscription summary card |
| `SubscriptionsPage.jsx` | `/superadmin/subscriptions` | Super Admin | All school subscriptions table: plan tier, renewal date, payment status, Change Plan action |
| `SaProfilePage.jsx` | `/superadmin/profile` | Super Admin | Edit super admin name, email, password form |

### Shared School Panel (All Roles)

| Page | Route | Panel | Contains |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DashboardPage.jsx` | `/dashboard` | All school roles | Role-aware: renders one of 7 sub-components. Finance: fee/salary stats + charts. HR: leave queue counts. Academic: timetable + exam stats. Admin: student/library/transport stats. Teacher: class stats + recent assignments. Student/Parent: personal academic summary. All use StatsCard + Recharts. |
| `ProfilePage.jsx` | `/profile` | All school roles | Edit name, avatar upload, password change, linked mobile number. Same page for every role. `mustChangePassword` banner for first-time managers. |
| `NotificationsPage.jsx` | `/notifications` | All school roles | Teacher: compose form with scope selector (individual/section/class), sent list. Student/Parent: inbox view with read/unread. All: notification history paginated. |
| `AnnouncementsPage.jsx` | `/announcements` | All school roles | Principal/Admin Manager: Post Announcement button + modal. All: paginated announcement card list. |
| `CalendarPage.jsx` | `/calendar` | All school roles | Monthly calendar grid with event badges. Academic Manager/Principal: Add Event button + modal. All: view events with type color-coding. |

### Academic Management

| Page | Route | Panel | Contains |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ClassesPage.jsx` | `/classes` | Academic Manager | Class cards with section sub-lists. Add Class button. Per-class: Add Section button, assign class teacher dropdown, set monitor student. Academic year panel at top. |
| `TimetablePage.jsx` | `/timetable` | Academic Manager (edit), All (view) | Weekly period grid by day (MonвЂ“Sat). Academic Manager: editable cells with subject/teacher. Teacher: read-only filtered to their periods. Student: read-only section schedule. |
| `ExamsPage.jsx` | `/exams` | Academic Manager/Principal (create), others (view) | Exam cards per class. Date sheet accordion per exam. Create Exam modal with dateSheet entry. |
| `AttendancePage.jsx` | `/attendance` | Teacher (mark), Principal/Academic Manager (report) | Teacher view: date picker + section selector + student roster grid with Present/Absent/Late toggle. Report view: filters + DataTable with attendance stats. |
| `AssignmentsPage.jsx` | `/assignments` | Teacher (create/own list), Student/Parent (view section) | Teacher: Create Assignment button, list of own posted assignments with due dates. Student: section assignment cards with attachment download links. |
| `MarksPage.jsx` | `/marks` | Teacher (enter), Principal (view) | Exam selector + section selector в†’ tabular grid: rows=students, columns=subjects, cells=obtained/total inputs. Publish button. |
| `ResultsPage.jsx` | `/results` | Teacher (review+publish), Student/Parent (view own), Principal (view all) | Teacher: review marks summary per student before publishing, Publish action. Student/Parent: own published results with subject breakdown and grade. |

## Phase 7 вЂ” Frontend Feature Topology Detail

### HTTP Client

- **`frontend/src/services/axiosInstance.js`**: `axios.create({ baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL })`. Request interceptor: reads `accessToken` from `localStorage` в†’ attaches `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Response interceptor: on 401 в†’ POST `/api/v1/auth/refresh` в†’ store new token в†’ retry original request. If refresh fails в†’ `store.dispatch(clearAuth())` в†’ `window.location = '/login'`.
- **`frontend/src/services/endpoints.js`**: All API URL strings as named constants. Example: `export const AUTH_LOGIN_EMAIL = '/auth/login/email'`. Feature service files import from here вЂ” never hardcode URL strings.

### Global State (Redux Toolkit)

**`frontend/src/store/store.js`**: `configureStore` combining all slices.
**`frontend/src/store/rootReducer.js`**: combines: `auth`, `ui`, `notification`, `dashboard`, `student`, `teacher`, `manager`, `class`, `attendance`, `timetable`, `exam`, `marks`, `result`, `assignment`, `fee`, `salary`, `leave`, `library`, `transport`, `announcement`, `calendar`, `audit`, `settings`, `subscription`, `saSchool`.

**Global slices:**

| Slice File | State Shape | Async Operations |
|---|---|---|
| `authSlice.js` (features/auth/) | `{ user: {id,name,email,role,schoolId,avatar}, isAuthenticated, loading, error }` | `loginWithEmail`, `loginWithOtp`, `sendOtp`, `refreshToken`, `logout`, `forgotPassword`, `resetPassword` |
| `notificationSlice.js` (features/notifications/) | `{ notifications: [], unreadCount: 0, loading, error }` | `fetchNotifications`, `fetchUnreadCount`, `markAsRead`, `sendNotification` |
| `uiSlice.js` (store/) | `{ sidebarCollapsed: false, globalLoading: false }` | вЂ” (sync only) |

**Feature slice pattern** (same structure for all):
```
{
  items: [],          // list data
  selectedItem: null, // detail view data
  loading: false,
  error: null,
  pagination: { page: 1, limit: 20, total: 0, totalPages: 0 }
}
```
Async operations: `fetchList`, `fetchOne`, `create`, `update`, `delete` (where applicable per feature).

### Router

**`frontend/src/router/AppRouter.jsx`**: All route definitions. Structure:
- `/login`, `/forgot-password` в†’ PublicLayout (no auth required)
- `/superadmin/*` в†’ SuperAdminLayout в†’ ProtectedRoute в†’ RoleGuard (allowedRoles: ['superAdmin'])
- `/*` в†’ AuthLayout в†’ ProtectedRoute в†’ individual pages each wrapped in RoleGuard with appropriate allowedRoles array

**`frontend/src/router/ProtectedRoute.jsx`**: Reads `isAuthenticated` from Redux `authSlice`. If false в†’ `<Navigate to="/login" />`.

**`frontend/src/router/RoleGuard.jsx`**: Accepts `allowedRoles` prop. Checks `user.role` against array. If not in array в†’ `<Navigate to="/forbidden" />`.

### Global Hooks

| Hook | File | Purpose | Used by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `useAuth` | `hooks/useAuth.js` | Returns `{ user, isAuthenticated, role }` from Redux `authSlice`. Convenience hook. | All protected components |
| `useSocket` | `hooks/useSocket.js` | Initializes Socket.io-client connection with JWT from localStorage. Joins user room on connect. Dispatches `notificationSlice` actions on incoming notification events. Returns `socket` instance. | AuthLayout (mounts once on login) |
| `useDebounce` | `hooks/useDebounce.js` | Standard debounce hook for search inputs (300ms default). | StudentsListPage, LibraryPage, TeachersPage, any search input |

### App Constants

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `constants/roles.js` | `export const ROLES = { SUPER_ADMIN: 'superAdmin', PRINCIPAL: 'principal', FINANCE_MANAGER: 'financeManager', HR_MANAGER: 'hrManager', ACADEMIC_MANAGER: 'academicManager', ADMIN_MANAGER: 'adminManager', TEACHER: 'teacher', STUDENT: 'student', PARENT: 'parent' }` |
| `constants/statusLabels.js` | Fee statuses, salary statuses, attendance statuses, leave statuses, subscription statuses вЂ” all display labels keyed by status string |
| `constants/appConfig.js` | `PAGINATION_LIMIT: 20`, `MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB: 5`, `OTP_LENGTH: 6`, `ACCESS_TOKEN_KEY: 'accessToken'`, `SOCKET_URL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL` |

### Styles

- **`frontend/src/styles/global.css`**: CSS custom properties (design tokens), CSS reset, base typography, and utility classes. Defines color palette, spacing scale, font family (Inter from Google Fonts), border radius scale, shadow scale, transition defaults.
- Each component and page has a co-located `.css` file (e.g., `LoginPage.css` next to `LoginPage.jsx`). No inline styles anywhere.

### Non-feature Pages

| Page | Route | Location | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ForbiddenPage.jsx` | `/forbidden` | `src/router/` or `src/components/` | Shown by RoleGuard on role mismatch |
| `NotFoundPage.jsx` | `*` | `src/router/` or `src/components/` | 404 catch-all |

---

## Key Decisions Made in Chat 2A

1. **Models in shared `src/models/` not co-located in features**: 21 models are referenced across multiple features. Co-locating would create circular import hell (e.g., `notificationService` needs User, Section, Class вЂ” all from different features). Shared model folder is cleaner and more maintainable.

2. **Services in shared `src/services/` not per-feature**: Services like `notificationService` (used by multiple features), `fileService` (used by students, assignments, profile), and `authService` (used by auth feature + middleware) are genuinely cross-cutting. Per-feature would force either duplication or inter-feature imports.

3. **`AcademicYear` as standalone model with `isCurrent` flag**: Switching academic years is a key school operation. A standalone model with `isCurrent` allows clean year switching without touching any other document. All academic data (Attendance, Fee, Assignment, Marks, Timetable, Exam) carries `academicYearId` for historical integrity.

4. **`DashboardPage.jsx` renders role-aware sub-components**: Single `/dashboard` route, role checks inside the component. Avoids 7 separate routes and keeps router config clean. Each sub-component (e.g., `TeacherDashboard.jsx`) is independently maintainable.

5. **Recharts over Chart.js**: Better React component model, simpler responsive container setup, no global Chart.js registration required. Slightly larger bundle justified by the number of charts across 7 dashboard variants.

6. **`pdfkit` on backend for report cards**: Avoids shipping a PDF library to the browser. Report card endpoint returns `Content-Type: application/pdf` with `Content-Disposition: attachment`. Frontend just opens the URL in a new tab or triggers `window.open`.

7. **`suspensionCheck.js` as a separate middleware**: Keeps `authMiddleware.js` clean (it only verifies the JWT). Suspension is a business rule, not an auth rule. Separation makes it easy to apply only to school-scoped routes without touching the JWT verification logic.

8. **`uploadMiddleware.js` (multer in memory)**: Files go to memory buffer в†’ `fileService` uploads to Cloudinary в†’ stores URL. No temp files on disk. Memory storage is safe at the expected file sizes (max 5MB per file, max 20MB total per request).

9. **Parent-student link via `User.studentIds[]`**: Parents are Users with `role: 'parent'` and a `studentIds` array. When a student is admitted, the parent User is created/linked simultaneously. This enables straightforward parent portal queries (filter by `studentIds` contains `req.user.id`). No separate `ParentStudent` join table needed.

10. **`useSocket` hook mounts once in `AuthLayout`**: Socket connection is initialized when `AuthLayout` mounts (i.e., after login). Torn down on logout when `AuthLayout` unmounts. This is the only socket connection in the app вЂ” prevents multiple connections from nested components.

11. **`ForbiddenPage` and `NotFoundPage` placed in `src/router/`**: These are routing concerns, not feature-specific UI. Keeping them in `router/` alongside `ProtectedRoute` and `RoleGuard` groups all routing infrastructure together.

12. **ESLint Airbnb over Standard**: Airbnb config enforces more explicit React patterns (prop-types discipline, exhaustive effect deps, explicit returns). Better suited for a large 9-role codebase where code review discipline matters.
